description: Mastering-grade multi-plugin parameter randomizer and modulator VST3/Standalone with integrated WrongEQ module. Hosts multiple VST3 plugins in series or parallel (bus-based routing), exposes all their parameters, and modulates them via 7 configurable logic blocks (randomize, envelope follower, sample modulator, morph pad, shapes LFO, shapes range, lane automation). Features a full parametric EQ with drawable breakpoints, wave ripple engine, multiband routing, and Linkwitz-Riley crossovers. WebView2-based UI with real-time visualization, modulation arc display, 13 themes, granular undo/redo, visibility-culled rendering, async plugin loading, hosted-plugin gesture detection, and DAW automation proxy system (2048 AP_ slots).

source_files.PluginProcessor.cpp: 2069 lines — Constructor, lifecycle, createParameterLayout (2048 AP_ proxy slots), updateLogicBlocks, state save/restore, sample modulator API, GestureListener registration, rebuildPluginSlots, JUCE boilerplate
source_files.ProcessBlock.cpp: 2698 lines — processBlock (audio pipeline), SEH crash guard, logic block engine (all 7 block types incl. lane), WrongEQ DSP (SmoothBiquad, Linkwitz-Riley crossovers, allpass phase compensation, wave ripple), glide processing, NaN sanitization, dry/wet mix
source_files.PluginHosting.cpp: 1474 lines — Plugin scan with SEH crash isolation, deep scan caching, findPluginDescription, instantiatePlugin (COM-safe), proxy parameter pool (2048 AP_ slots with dynamic name/range sync), DAW automation bridge, glide FIFO API, MPE support
source_files.PluginProcessor.h: 1517 lines — All data structures (HostedPlugin, LogicBlock, GestureListener, ProxyParameter, SmoothBiquad, readback FIFOs, crash event FIFO, pluginSlots[32] O(1) lookup, paramTouched atomic flags)
source_files.PluginEditor.cpp: 1650 lines — WebView2 bridge, 25+ native functions, async plugin loading, 2-tier real-time polling with visibility culling, WrongEQ panel bridge, crash notification relay
source_files.PluginEditor.h: 156 lines — Editor class with WebView, relays, attachments, expandedPluginIds, paramIdentCache, modulatedParamKeys

ui_modules.index.html: 333 lines — Main HTML shell with all panels and modals
ui_modules.js/state.js: 61 lines — Global state variables and data structures
ui_modules.js/juce_bridge.js: 47 lines — JUCE WebView native function bridge helpers
ui_modules.js/juce_integration.js: 56 lines — JUCE relay/attachment integration for MIX and BYPASS
ui_modules.js/theme_system.js: 1768 lines — 13 themes with comprehensive CSS variable system (150+ vars per theme), settings panel, dynamic slider styling
ui_modules.js/undo_system.js: 176 lines — Granular undo/redo: single param (setParam), multi-param (applyParamBatch), full-state entry types
ui_modules.js/plugin_rack.js: 1842 lines — Plugin card rendering, param display, knob SVGs, drag-to-assign, bulk select, loading feedback, visibility culling, scroll-based dirty tracking
ui_modules.js/logic_blocks.js: 2711 lines — Block card rendering, morph pad, shapes pad, wiring, all block UIs, batch randomize
ui_modules.js/lane_module.js: 3597 lines — Per-parameter automation lanes with drawable envelopes, draw/erase/line tools, grid snapping, loop modes
ui_modules.js/context_menus.js: 309 lines — Right-click menus for params and plugins (lock/unlock, bypass, presets)
ui_modules.js/preset_system.js: 1688 lines — Per-plugin presets (batch IPC), global presets (batch IPC), search, type toggle, delete confirmation, dirty indicator
ui_modules.js/realtime.js: 739 lines — RT data listener, envelope/sample/morph readback, auto-locate, crash toast, live BPM display, visibility-culled param refresh
ui_modules.js/controls.js: 544 lines — Header controls, keyboard shortcuts, collapse/expand all, plugin loading state, themed toast notifications
ui_modules.js/persistence.js: 532 lines — State save/restore to/from processor (survives editor close/reopen)
ui_modules.js/expose_system.js: 587 lines — DAW parameter expose system with proxy parameter mapping and grouping
ui_modules.js/help_panel.js: 488 lines — Interactive help panel with contextual documentation
ui_modules.js/wrongeq_canvas.js: 4460 lines — WrongEQ module: parametric EQ with drawable breakpoints, canvas rendering, band cards, Q-bandwidth visualization, wave ripple engine, multiband routing, slope cascading, segment per-point overrides, EQ presets

css_modules: css/variables.css — 112 CSS custom properties with defaults
css/header.css — 739 lines, Bus group/header/mute/solo styling with CSS variable theming
css/plugin_rack.css — 622 lines, Loading cards, preset flash, parameter rows
css/logic_blocks.css — 2378 lines, All block types, lane automation, modulation UI
css/dialogs.css — 799 lines, Modals, popups, context menus
css/style.css — 1297 lines, Main layout and component styles
css/wrongeq.css — 1720 lines, WrongEQ panel, band cards, canvas, routing sidebar

plugin_hosting.vst3_scanning: Recursive filesystem scan with SEH crash isolation per-plugin and deep scan caching

plugin_loading.async: Two-phase async loading: disk scan on background thread, COM instantiation on message thread
plugin_loading.findPluginDescription: Phase 1 — thread-safe cache lookup + disk scan (no UI freeze)
plugin_loading.instantiatePlugin: Phase 2 — createPluginInstance + bus layout + prepareToPlay (message thread, COM-safe)
plugin_loading.loadPlugin: Convenience wrapper calling both phases in sequence (used by setStateInformation)
plugin_loading.crash_protection: SEH __try/__except + try/catch around createPluginInstance and prepareToPlay

plugin_hosting.serial_processing: Hosted plugins process audio in series (chain order)

parallel_processing.bus_system: Up to 8 parallel buses, plugins assigned to buses via UI badge

bus_ui.color_coding: Per-theme bus color palettes (8 colors per theme), 10px color dot with glow
bus_ui.header_strip: Bus name, volume slider, mute/solo buttons, collapse chevron
bus_ui.tint_system: color-mix() based background tinting via --bus-tint CSS variable
bus_ui.badge_dropdown: Colored bus assignment dropdown on plugin cards

parallel_processing.equal_gain: Output summed with 1/sqrt(N) equal-gain compensation per active bus
parallel_processing.single_bus_optimization: Falls back to sequential path when only 1 bus is active
parallel_processing.zero_allocation: 8 pre-allocated bus buffers in prepareToPlay, atomic routing mode toggle
parallel_processing.crash_rollback: Uses reserved 8th buffer as scratch for crash rollback (no audio-thread allocation)

plugin_hosting.plugin_editor_windows: Native floating editor windows for each hosted plugin

crash_protection.seh_guard: Windows Structured Exception Handling (__try/__except) catches access violations and stack overflows in processBlock and plugin scanning
crash_protection.cpp_exception_guard: try/catch(...) wraps all hosted plugin processBlock calls
crash_protection.nan_inf_sanitization: Post-plugin output buffer scan replaces NaN/Inf with 0.0f
crash_protection.auto_bypass: Crashed plugins are immediately bypassed, buffer rolled back to pre-crash state
crash_protection.crash_notification: Lock-free FIFO relays crash events to UI as themed toast notifications with re-enable button
crash_protection.reset_crash: Users can re-enable crashed plugins via UI button (re-prepares the plugin)

wrongeq_module.description: Mastering-grade drawable parametric EQ with integrated wave ripple and multiband routing

eq_engine.breakpoints: Up to 32 drawable EQ points with frequency, gain, Q, and type per point
eq_engine.slope_cascading: 12/24/48 dB/oct per band (1/2/4 cascaded biquads), visually reflected on canvas
eq_engine.biquad_engine: SmoothBiquad with true linear per-sample coefficient interpolation, Audio EQ Cookbook core with RBJ shelf-slope (S) compliance
eq_engine.gain_range: Dynamic ±48dB synchronized between UI and DSP

wave_ripple.description: LFO-driven wave animation that modulates point positions
wave_ripple.continuous_drift: Optional continuous frequency drift independent of wave animation

multiband_routing.split_mode: Linkwitz-Riley crossovers split audio into per-band frequency ranges
multiband_routing.per_band_plugins: Route hosted plugins to specific EQ bands
multiband_routing.allpass_compensation: Phase-aligned summation for transparent crossover behavior
multiband_routing.gap_band_handling: Orphaned audio between bands correctly routed to passthrough

canvas_visualization.frequency_response: Real-time biquad frequency response curve with slope-aware rendering
canvas_visualization.point_shapes: Per-type point shapes (circle/diamond/triangle/half-circle) matching FabFilter conventions
canvas_visualization.q_bandwidth: Selected point shows Q bandwidth visualization with bell curve overlay
canvas_visualization.band_legend: Footer legend with per-band frequency ranges using stable base X positions
canvas_visualization.solo_highlights: Band region highlighting for soloed points

band_cards.value_block: Frequency + Gain/Q grouped in shared dark inset container
band_cards.per_point_routing: Plugin routing panel per band with bus assignment

types.randomize: Discrete parameter randomization with range, quantize, glide. Batch IPC via applyParamBatch
types.sample: Audio file modulator (WAV/AIFF/FLAC/MP3/OGG), loop/oneshot/pingpong modes, speed control, reverse, jump modes
types.morph_pad: XY pad with up to 12 snapshots, IDW interpolation, manual/auto/trigger modes
types.shapes: Geometric LFO with 11 shape types, depth/speed/spin controls, tracking modes
types.shapes_range: Per-parameter variant of shapes with individual range controls per target
types.lane: Per-parameter automation lanes with drawable envelope curves, draw/erase/line tools, grid snapping, forward/reverse/pingpong play modes

common_features.targets: Any block can target any combination of hosted plugin parameters
common_features.assign_mode: Click block → click params to assign (Ctrl/Shift for multi-select, All/None bulk buttons)
common_features.polarity: Bipolar / Unipolar Up / Unipolar Down modes for relative modulation
common_features.clock_source: Per-block choice of DAW tempo or internal tempo

daw_integration.proxy_parameter_system: 2048 AP_ slots with dynamic name/range sync to DAW automation lanes
daw_integration.parameter_grouping: Exposed parameters organized into logical groups in DAW automation list
daw_integration.midi_output: Logic blocks can send MIDI CC to other plugins for cross-plugin modulation
daw_integration.multiple_sidechain_sources: Multiple sidechain inputs for independent audio-reactive blocks
daw_integration.tempo_aware_preset_switching: DAW transport markers/bar positions trigger preset changes

parameter_management.parameter_locking: Lock/unlock individual params (locked params excluded from randomization and assignment)
parameter_management.auto_locate: Scroll-to and flash parameters touched in hosted plugin's own editor
parameter_management.self_write_filtering: Logic blocks, glides, DAW automation, and JS calls are excluded from auto-locate detection
parameter_management.param_touch_tracking: Suspend modulation while user is grabbing a parameter via UI knob, hosted plugin gesture listener, or DAW automation (3-layer touch detection)
parameter_management.gesture_listeners: Per-plugin GestureListener structs detect hosted plugin UI interactions via JUCE's AudioProcessorParameter::Listener
parameter_management.proxy_parameter_pool: 2048-slot pool exposing hosted plugin params to DAW automation with dynamic names and ranges
parameter_management.o1_lookup: pluginSlots[32] array for O(1) parameter access by plugin ID

preset_system.per_plugin_presets: Save/load parameter snapshots per hosted plugin with search and type toggle
preset_system.snapshot_library: Browse and load presets/snapshots from any plugin into morph pad
preset_system.global_presets: Save/load entire session with dirty indicator, nav arrows, search
preset_system.delete_confirmation: Two-step delete confirmation for all preset types
preset_system.save_feedback: Visual flash confirmation on successful save

visibility_culling_js.description: refreshParamDisplay pre-computes visible parameter IDs by walking expanded card DOM children against scroll bounds
visibility_culling_js.collapsed_cost: Zero — collapsed cards contribute no DOM queries

visibility_culling_cpp.description: Tier 1 (60Hz) and Tier 2 (6Hz) polling skip plugins not in expandedPluginIds set
visibility_culling_cpp.resync_on_expand: lastParamValues cleared when plugin expands → forces full value resync

batch_ipc.applyParamBatch: Single IPC call for N parameter changes (JSON array of {p, i, v})

performance.o1_param_lookup: pluginSlots[32] array replaces O(N) linear scans
performance.persistent_rng: static juce::Random (no identical sequences on rapid fire)

ui_system.settings_panel: Dropdown with theme picker grid, UI scale slider, auto-locate toggle, internal tempo BPM
ui_system.ui_scale: Adjustable from 0.25x to 3x via settings dropdown

real_time_visualization.envelope_levels: Per-block envelope follower level bars (from C++ at 60Hz)
real_time_visualization.morph_playheads: Per-block XY dot position synced from C++ auto modes
real_time_visualization.shape_dots: Per-block shape dot position + SVG rotation synced from C++
real_time_visualization.eq_canvas: Real-time EQ curve with per-band frequency response, slope visualization, Q bandwidth overlay
real_time_visualization.param_knob_svgs: Real-time SVG arc knobs with range arc overlay (visibility-culled)
real_time_visualization.param_value_text: Real-time parameter display text from plugin getText() (visibility-culled)
real_time_visualization.rms_levels: Main and sidechain audio RMS for UI

keyboard_shortcuts.escape: Close modals / exit assign mode / clear selection
keyboard_shortcuts.ctrl_a: Select all unlocked params (in assign mode)

undo_redo.param_undo: Single knob change → setParam (1 IPC call)
undo_redo.multi_param_undo: Randomize/preset load → applyParamBatch (1 IPC call for N params)
undo_redo.full_state_undo: Structural changes → applyParamBatch for params + block/plugin restore

audio_engine.sidechain_input: Optional sidechain bus for audio-triggered blocks
audio_engine.midi_input: Full MIDI note and CC support with channel filtering
audio_engine.glide_engine: Lock-free FIFO (512 slots) for smooth per-buffer parameter interpolation
audio_engine.internal_tempo: Independent BPM clock (per-block selectable: DAW or internal)
audio_engine.sample_accurate_triggers: Tempo-synced triggers use PPQ position for beat-accurate firing

audio_thread_safety.mutex_pattern: try_to_lock in processBlock prevents priority inversion
audio_thread_safety.zero_allocation: No heap allocation on audio thread, pre-allocated buffers throughout
audio_thread_safety.persistent_rng: static Random in randomizeParams, member Random in processor for audio thread

state_persistence.processor_state: Saves/restores all hosted plugins (paths + param values) and UI state in DAW project
state_persistence.ui_state: Full JSON serialization of blocks, mappings, locks, theme, scale — survives editor close/reopen
state_persistence.plugin_id_patching: Restored plugin IDs match saved IDs to preserve block target references
state_persistence.null_safe_restore: All numeric fields use != null checks to prevent data loss when user value is 0

native_functions: loadPlugin(pluginPath) → { id, name, params[] } (async: bg thread scan → msg thread instantiate)
applyParamBatch(jsonString) — [{p, i, v}, ...] in one IPC call
rt_events: __rt_data__ → { rms, scRms, bpm, playing, ppq, midi[], envLevels[], trigFired[], sampleHeads[], morphHeads[], params[], touchedParam }

phase_history.notes: Multi-plugin support with collapsible, drag-reorderable plugin cards.
Full C++/WebView2 implementation. VST3 + Standalone build successful.
Morph Pad logic block: XY pad, snapshots, IDW interpolation, manual/auto/trigger modes, 5 explore modes, tempo sync.
Internal tempo control, per-block clock source, Shapes block and Shapes Range block.
SEH crash guard (Windows), NaN/Inf sanitization, auto-bypass with UI toast, safe plugin loading.
Preset UX overhaul, granular undo/redo, keyboard shortcuts, parallel plugin routing with bus system.
10 themes verified. Added Slate Studio, Vintage Console, Win98, Warm Tape.
Lock-free audio thread: pluginSlots[32] O(1) lookup, persistent RNG, batch IPC.
Two-layer visibility culling, batch IPC for undo/redo/preset load, async plugin loading, bus UI overhaul.
Modulation arc visualization, hosted plugin gesture detection, persistence audit (15+ data-loss bug fixes).
WrongEQ module: parametric EQ with drawable breakpoints, 6 filter types, SmoothBiquad engine, canvas visualization, band cards, presets.
Lane logic block: per-parameter drawable envelopes, draw/erase/line tools, grid snapping, loop modes.
WrongEQ multiband routing: Linkwitz-Riley crossovers, per-band plugin routing, allpass phase compensation, split mode.
Wave ripple engine, depth/warp/steps/tilt global transforms, Q wobble fix, split mode audio audit.
2048-slot proxy parameter system with dynamic name/range sync, parameter grouping, MIDI output, multiple sidechains, MPE support.

Plugin renamed to Hostesa. 3 new themes (Deep Space, Pitch Black, Obsidian, Deep Forest — 13 total). EQ card redesign: value block inset, always-visible S/M/× buttons, theme-safe contrast. Slope visible on canvas with correct cascading curve. Segment selection system removed (dead feature cleanup). Footer legend range bug fixed (stable base X). Preset path changed to %APPDATA%/DimitarPetrov/Hostesa.
